name: Stump Long Table
description: Still exudes the scent of nature.

name: Natural Scenery
description: Feels like I'm having a picnic in the countryside.

name: Family Table
description: The retro colors make you relax subconsciously.

name: Academy Meeting
description: It feels like delicious food will suddenly appear at any moment.

name: Christmas Long Table
description: Have a big meal together

name: Lively Reunion Table
description: Enjoy a lively reunion dinner!

name: Candy Feast
description: Candies are great, but let's not be greedy.

name: Bustling Feast
description: As night falls, the lights are lit. Welcome to the feast!

name: Monster Banquet
description: The stool feels a little slimy.

name: Shaggy Long Table
description: Do you want to do some crafts while waiting for the food to arrive?

name: Wonderland Banquet
description: Welcome to the Queen's banquet, our distinguished guest.

name: Beach Party
description: You can feel the sea breeze here!
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Magic Banquet
description: Magic does not make the food delicious, but love can.

name: Sea Salt Cream
description: Bread, meat, and a little bit of thought put in creates an unforgettable party.

name: Sunset Invitation
description: A gentle reminder that the event only begins after sunset!

name: Familial Greetings
description: I sincerely invite all of you to gather around this table.

name: Early Summertime Gathering
description: Let's go out and play before the weather turns scorching!

name: Shredded Coconut Macaron
description: The cosmetic tools on the table are ready for you to use!

name: Shardglass Banquet
description: So, these mirrors all reflect differing images! Don't overthink things!

name: Oceanic Feast
description: The ocean has prepared a grand feast for you.

name: Snow Kingdom Tales
description: Just chatting here until daybreak...

name: Fruit Party
description: Trust me, there's definitely enough fruit to go around!

name: Dusk Ballad
description: Let's go on a date during sunset.

name: Tasty Feast
description: Like a wondrous journey, the flavors explode on your palate.

name: Floral Feast
description: Enjoy a delicious meal in this romantic atmosphere.

name: Festive Celebrations
description: You can play with cards while waiting for your meal.

name: Summertime Invitation
description: I wish to admire the summer sunset with you.

name: Snow Kingdom Banquet
description: Get a taste of Snow Kingdom's specialities.

name: Springtime Banquet
description: It's not every day we get together like this! Time to eat, drink, and be merry!

name: Galactic Invitation
description: Welcoming guests from millions of light-years away!

name: Log Meal Side Cabinet
description: A simple meal side cabinet made from logs.

name: Simple Meal Side Cabinet
description: Simple yet able to store many things!

name: Elegant Cabinet
description: Please mind your dining etiquette.

name: Luxurious Meal Side Cabinet
description: The cutlery placed on it all looks very exquisite.

name: Warm Meal Side Cabinet
description: It has a heating function that makes it feel warm to touch.

name: Chinese Meal Side Cabinet
description: Maybe there are some old treasures kept within the cabinet.

name: Food Truck Cabinet
description: Modified from an abandoned food truck. Has incredible storage capacity.

name: Elegant Veil
description: The thin layer of gauzy veil mitigates the metallic impact.

name: Mottled Antique Cabinet
description: Seems quite old with all the dark red stains on it.

name: Spring Cutlery Rack
description: Cute and practical!

name: Dreamland Travels
description: Is this real, or just a dream?

name: Lost Treasure Trove
description: Tons of long-lost treasures are haphazardly placed on the table.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Midnight Galaxy
description: Someone actually hid the stars here.

name: Sea Salt Chocolate
description: Could more desserts be hidden behind the curtain?

name: Tolling of Time
description: Silently waiting here all this while has made me lose track of time.

name: Contemplative Beauty
description: Come, try the tea that I've just boiled!

name: Sunrise Glory
description: The rays of the rising sun shine upon the sweet honey water, warming it up!

name: Double Sweetness
description: Double the sugar! Double the sweetness!

name: Dusk and Bones Table
description: Aww, there's nothing to be afraid of. The glasses here are all clean and safe to drink from!

name: Tipsy Tide
description: The flavor of the waves dances upon your tongue.

name: Tranquil Hour
description: Come and recite a poem about winter.

name: Cherry Impact
description: What does orange juice mixed with cherries taste like?

name: Echoing Accent
description: Low and deep accents don't fade away easily.

name: Gear Meal Side Cabinet
description: But you have to operate it manually...

name: Purifying Side Cabinet
description: Magically cleans any cutlery placed within it in only one second.

name: Sweet Moment
description: Come and try this unique drink that the little ghost has concocted for you!

name: Peaceful Summer
description: Hum a little tune while you finish the housework that has been left undone.

name: Purifying Snow
description: The snow cleans eerything spotless.

name: Jade Terrace
description: What a pleasure it is to share a drink with you!

name: Meteoric Test Bench
description: The aliens seem to be very interested in the cutlery from earth.

name: Bamboo and Rock Sink
description: The flowing water is cool and refreshing.

name: Solid Wooden Sink
description: Remember to wash your hands properly using the correct method.

name: Log Aroma
description: Will there be additional smells when I wash my hands using this?

name: Elegant Style
description: It's only elegant when you cannot relax at all.

name: Starry Sink
description: Be careful you don't get electrocuted!

name: Luck Changing Sink
description: Wash away the unhappiness of the previous year to welcome the new year!

name: Cherry Mirage
description: Wanna try a cherry-flavored hand soap?

name: Trickling Moments
description: As time trickles away alongside the flower petals, only their aroma remains.

name: Soul Cleansing
description: A cutie will inspect how everyone washes their hands.

name: Baby Elephant Sink
description: The baby elephant supervisor is reminding you to line up and wash your hands!

name: Colorful Teapot
description: Who's fooling around? I'm hard at work right now!

name: Octopus Sink
description: Don't worry! The octopus employee makes it a point to gargle every day.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Galactic Dreams
description: Will the water that flows past the moon turn into sweet dreams?

name: Sea Salt Bubble
description: If you take away the cheese the bear is holding, something amazing will happen.

name: Approaching Nightfall
description: Don't forget to bring your umbrella with you at night, or you'll be burned by the stars.

name: Fortuitous Encounters
description: As long as you wash your hands regularly and stay hygenic, good things will keep happening to you! Trust me!

name: Sunflower Sink
description: The little sunflower by the side will make sure that you wash your hands properly!

name: Lady
description: The cute mirror makes you look even more adorable!

name: Skeletal Sink
description: The water's clean! Come wash your hands. What bones? Your eyes must be playing tricks on you.

name: Seashell Sink
description: Glug glug... let the bubbles carry all of the germs away.

name: Log Sink
description: Oh no, the water has frozen into ice!

name: Pineapple Bubbles
description: Don't binge on too much pineapple, or you'll get pineapple tounge!

name: Starry Daydream
description: Do stars also make snot bubbles when thay dream during the day?

name: Mechanical Cleaning Station
description: Keep it clean to ensure smooth operation.

name: Guardian of Purity
description: Dedicated to safeguarding the cleanlinessof your hands!

name: Reverly Sink
description: Don't worry! The water is actually very clean!

name: Unending Summers
description: The weather may be hot, but the water is ice cold.

name: Snowy Night Lake
description: Reflects your beautiful face.

name: Elegant Washstand
description: Made from precious rosewood, its design is both graceful and refined.

name: Starry Vine Sink
description: It is said that washing your hands with the dew of the starry vine will bring good fortune.

name: Simple Dining Table
description: Although its simple, it has everything you'll need.

name: Afternoon Teatime
description: Afternoon is the perfect time for eating!

name: Grandma
description: You're eating too little! Is the dessert that Grandma made not nice?

name: Luxurious Desserts
description: It has everything so you won't feel like leaving it.

name: Sweet Sugar Frosting
description: Eat more sweets in the winter to store energy.

name: Sichuan Style Snack Counter
description: The spiciness keeps you warm in the winter.

name: Reverie Patchwork
description: Different desserts meet here.

name: Fancy Display
description: The artist meticulously placed the fruits and accompanying cloth on the table in order to achieve the desired effect.

name: Creepy Dining Table
description: The food on it always disappears mysteriously.

name: Floral Snacks
description: These flowers bloom on your taste buds.

name: Curious Desserts
description: Watch out, you may turn into a giant if you munch on a certain one!

name: Summer Sun
description: The food items are using parasols to protect themselves from the scorching sun.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Rose Blossoms
description: Be careful of the thorns on the roses when you approach the table.

name: Ocean Blue Flash
description: Look! It's a blue-colored cake!

name: Dream Corner
description: Let me sneak a bite... and another bite!

name: Dim Sum Assortment
description: Who secretly ate the sim sum? Look, there are still crumbs at the corners of your mouth!

name: Summertime Beginnings
description: An almost imperceptible sensation of heat indicates the imminent arrival of summer.

name: Cherry Mille-Feuille
description: Happiness is like cherries that are stacked atop each other in layers

name: Thorny Coffin
description: This coffin comes with cool air circulation. Perfect for keeping ingredients cold and fresh!

name: Sweet Ballad
description: Enjoy a taste of sweetness while you're serenaded by a beautiful ballad.

name: Cocoa Chocolate
description: You should eat food that is high in calories during the winter!

name: Fruity Flavors
description: Let's play a game! Looser eats the lemon slice!

name: Orange Fruit Juice
description: Don't you feel like haing a sip of iced orange juice in summer?

name: Mechanical Snack
description: Have a taste of a different flavor.

name: Fairytale Flavors
description: Flavors that seem like they came straight out of a fairytale.

name: Delicious Snack Counter
description: I just caught someoneblatantly sneaking a bite!

name: Butterfly Honey Feast
description: What does a butterfly-shaped cake taste like?

name: Icy Bites
description: Sweet, cold, and yummy!

name: Tea and Pastry Stand
description: Cold mist is still rising from the frosty cream dessert!

name: Interstellar Supply Point
description: Someone here is trying to steal the cupcake!

name: Mysterious Bird Nest
description: No idea whose nest this is but let's leave it as a decor.

name: Afternoon Nap
description: Afternoon is the perfect time for eating!

name: Mini Wooden House
description: The exterior has been meticulously painted.

name: Little Ingenuity
description: Will flowers attract more pretty little birds here to stay?

name: Christmas Tree House
description: A luxurious double-layered wood design.

name: Good Fortune and Prosperity
description: May wealth come your way!

name: Magic Glasshouse
description: It's a magical world within!

name: Vine Hanging Basket
description: When sitting here, you feel as though you've been transported to a garden.

name: Magnolia Wood Clock
description: It lags by a few seconds every minute.

name: Cute Birdhouse
description: You're a romantic at heart.

name: Tick-tock Pocket Watch
description: Tick tock, tick tock! Time's up!

name: Opalescent Shell
description: Birds can never resist shiny items like this.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Rose Anthem
description: Where can such a unique rose be found?

name: Soft Toast Nest
description: Contentment is the most inconspicuous thief of time.

name: Lulling Crescent Bay
description: Go ahead and sleep. Once you do, you'll forget all of your worries.

name: Carved Bamboo Cage
description: Made of superior bamboo, this cage is exquisitely polished.

name: Honey Bee Hanging Basket
description: When the bees are tired from gathering nectar, they gather here to rest... but shh! Keep this a secret!

name: Cream Pavilion
description: It must be really peaceful to sleep here.

name: Mesmerizing Birdcage
description: You mustn't rest herefor too long.

name: Mysterious Boat
description: This seems to be the legendary missing treasure boat.

name: Snowfield Party
description: Warm yourselves up by coming inside for a dance!

name: House of Berries
description: Keep out unless you're a berry lover!

name: Purple Night Home
description: Have you ever seen a purple sky?

name: Steam-powered Bird Cage
description: The perfect blend of metal and nature.

name: Fragrant Flower Float
description: It's so relaxing to float around!

name: Magical Mini Theater
description: This isn't just a performance! Everything that I conjure is real!

name: Glass Greenhouse
description: Fall asleep to the scent of flowers...

name: Magical Carriage
description: What could be inside?

name: Leisurely Peddler
description: Come over and take a look! I made all of these myself!

name: Galactic Tour
description: Make sure that you're wearing a spacesuit!

name: Bamboo Floor Lamp
description: Bursting with natural style. Brightness is guaranteed!

name: Countryside Lights
description: May they light up the path before you.

name: Iron Floor Lamp
description: A reassuring sight.

name: Vibe Night Light
description: Its warmth will make you sleepy.

name: Teddy Lamp
description: You no longer have to be afraid of walking in the dark!

name: Slumbering Angel
description: Hush, don't wake him up!

name: Spooky Lamp
description: Although it looks very unhappy, it does collect a salary.

name: Resplendent Star
description: Secretly pluck the stars from the sky and light them on a candle

name: Cat Ear Lamp
description: A quiet lamp that always illuminates its surroundings.

name: Romantic Candlelight
description: Lights up the way to wonderland.

name: Jellyfish Lampshade
description: Are jellyfish this lonely when they glow in the sea?

name: Stardust Glimmer
description: A glimmer that glows from a light year away.

name: Light Croissant
description: What guides you is not the stars, but a croissant.

name: Starry Staff
description: This does not seem like it was originally used for illumination. I wonder who placed it here?

name: Wishing Paper Lantern
description: If you write down your wish and place it in the lantern, it'll definitely come true next year!

name: Exquisite Palace Lantern
description: Its dim gow can be sustained for an entire night.

name: Cozy Hive
description: The bees will guide you on your way home!

name: Checkered Shade Lamp
description: By adding cute bows to a classic design, I have put the finishing touches to my newest work of art!

name: Ghoulish Hand
description: Do not even think of remoing the rose in its hand. That's its treasure!

name: Fishtail Lamp
description: The lamp's candle will never burn out even though it's underwater.

name: Glass Candle
description: A flame will not burn within the airtight glass.

name: Grape Floor Lamp
description: Emits a faint purplish glow.

name: Neon Musical Notes
description: Party yo your heart'scontent here!

name: Copper Glass Lamp
description: The weak glow is carefully protected within the glass shade.

name: Imprisoned Light
description: The cage won't be able to stop this light from shining.

name: Hot Air Balloon Lamp
description: Don't worry, it won't fly away.

name: Cool Warm Light
description: The flame can't be extinguished by wind.

name: Snowflake Lantern
description: Glows with a soft. icy light.

name: Gilded Candlestick
description: The combination of gold and candlestick makes it sparkle.

name: Autoluminescent Star
description: The warm light makes me feel warm and fuzzy inside too!

name: Wooden Frame Cinema
description: There are definitely films that you will like. The actors in this film all look very familiar.

name: Garden Mini Theater
description: A warm viewing ambience. The actors in this film all look very familiar.

name: Childhood Memories
description: Return to the time when everyone sat in the courtyard and watched movies. The actors in this film all look very familiar.

name: Low-key Luxury
description: The style that Dad likes. The actors in this film all look very familiar.

name: Bear Party
description: The bear huffs and puffs as it climbs up!

name: Happy Family
description: Watch some happy clips with your family.

name: Strawberry Ball Cinema
description: A limited number of ice-cream cones will be provided at the movies!

name: Subtle Floral Fragrance
description: This viewing spot is surrounded by a floral fragrance.

name: Floating Screen
description: Supernatural occurrences always happen.

name: Teddy Bear
description: The little bear can always dream of wondrous lands.

name: Hatter
description: Are you ready for the wildest, most intense show ever?!

name: Underwater Theater
description: Is there a movie you want to watch? Mr. Octopus will put it on for you!

name: Theater of Stars
description: A show featuring the stars.

name: Cookie Slot Machine
description: Let's just watch whichever movie that gets chose.

name: Lovers
description: Why do I feel sadder than usual? It's as though an arrowhas just pierced my heart.

name: Celestial Palace
description: Strange images can be seen here. Could this be the place where celestial beings live?!

name: Four-leaf Clover Theater
description: As the four-leaf clover rotates do select the move you wish to watch!

name: Peachy Receiver
description: Beep beep, roger! Now playing the newly received sweet moment.

name: Flutterdream Workshop
description: Flap your wings of creativity and leave behind a beautiful dream here.

name: Aquatic Cinema
description: Utilizes a unoque projection technique.

name: Teddy Cinema
description: Screening movies perfect for a winter day. Come and check them out!

name: Summertime Oranges
description: Orange you glad for this cool and refreshing summer?

name: Reverie Midnight Cinema
description: Watching a late-night movie is a rather novel experience.

name: Galactic Fantasy
description: There are films here collected from all over the galaxy.

name: White Swan Theater
description: You can watch an interesting classical play here.

name: Joyful Archives
description: All the happiest films are stored here. Do you want to watch one?

name: Butterfly Theater
description: A beautiful dream brought to you by little butterflies.

name: Tick-Tock Cinema
description: If only this movie could go on forever...

name: Hidden Spring Pavilion
description: From a viewer to being part of the show.

name: Science Fiction Screening Room
description: What to watch a science fiction movie together?

name: Log Cabinet
description: Large capacity, great for displaying your collectibles.

name: Simple Storage Shelf
description: A simple yet modern style.

name: Classical Collection Counter
description: Elegance will never become outdated.

name: Luxurious Display Case
description: Do your collectibles also need to be shielded from the sun?

name: Surprise Shelf
description: You should store presents from your friends carefully.

name: Rosewood Rack
description: Made from high quality rosewood so it's extremely sturdy.

name: Cookie Display Stand
description: A very sturdy cookie. You can rest assured placing things on it!

name: Artistic Shelf
description: Suitable for displaying the works of artists.

name: Bony Display Stand
description: The bones replenish their calcium very often so it is very sturdy.

name: Fantasy Collection
description: Unexpected things can be found here.

name: Dreamy Treasure Trove
description: All the treasures collected from the wonderland have been stored in here.

name: Sailing Log
description: These displayed items make up my sailing log.

name: Magic Display Stand
description: Your collection is safeguarded with magic.

name: Cheese Display Sand
description: Who was it that sneaked a few bites of the stand?

description: Despite being used to showcase prized collections, this cabinet itself is extremely valuable.

name: Residual Snow
description: Snow that has yet to melt is a decoration qnique to the winter season.

name: Memory Cultivation Center
description: Let me plant a memory to harvest even more happiness!

name: Mint Soda
description: The creamy color helps to make your collection stand out even more.

description: It may be an ominous red, but rest assured that your collection's in velvety safe protection.

name: Secret Treasures
description: Here are all of the precious treasures that were hidden beneath the chest!

name: Cozy Winter Treasure
description: Here, you can keep count of the joys that you have experienced.

name: Strawberry Invasion
description: It's impossible for anyone to dislike the sweet fragrance of strawberries!

name: Acrylic Display Rack
description: The translucent material makes your products look even more exquisite!

description: This wood is as tough as steel so you can place heavy objects on it.

name: Fairytale Treasures
description: Each of the treasures displayed here has its own fairytale to tell.

name: Frozen Frame of Dreams
description: No licking! The candy cane brackets are merely decorations!

name: Open Plains Display Stand
description: These are treasures that were found in the forest!

name: Frozen Treasure
description: Keeps precious treasures and memories buried in the snow.

name: Rare Treasures Rack
description: How did you come by all these wonderful treasures?

name: Rainbow Stellar Treasure
description: Items seem to have a scecial splendor when placed on it.

name: Old Telescope
description: Clean the lenses before using it.

name: Wooden Telescope
description: The wooden texture is very smooth.

name: Classic Replica
description: Is this a real antique or is it just replicating the texture?

name: Astronomer
description: Looks rather professional.

name: Fluffy Telescope
description: Would we see Santa Claus tonight?

name: Thousand-Mile Telescope
description: You can see whether things will go smoothly in the coming year.

name: Bicolor Telescope
description: Can you see the mountain made of frosting in the distance?

name: Plaster Observatory
description: Despite looking a little old, it still seems extremely specialized.

name: Prophetic Eye
description: It doesn't let you see what you want to see.

name: Floral Telescope
description: Faraway worlds are wonderful and varied.

name: White Rabbit Vista Point
description: Viewings are limited to only ten minutes-the staff is real strict on that.

name: Little Submarine
description: Slip into the submarine and observe the world go by!

name: Star Gazing
description: The stars are beautiful, because of a flower that cannot be seen.

name: Bear Telescope
description: A very cute telescope with bear ears. Maybe it'll be better at finding bees?

name: Omniscient View
description: You can look through this telescope, but what you see may not be what you're wishing for.

name: Fading Snow
description: As the snow melts, tiny green shoots can be seen sprouting out of the distant mountain.

name: Hexagonal View
description: Do you want to try viewing the outside scenery from within the beehive?

name: Cheesy Milk Pudding
description: Look through the puppy's gaze to find what you wish to see!

name: Unidentified Eyeball
description: Some say this used to be from the left eye socket of a certain pirate...

name: Fountain of Knowledge
description: Shows you the thing that you desire most.

name: Mysterious Guest

description: Let's see if anything interesting happened today.
